user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

fields.name: Piano Practice
fields.description: Piano Practice: a project to improve piano playing. Start with daily technical work and repertoire; initial focus is practicing scales for 30 minutes every day.

result.reasoning: Creating a new learning project under the Learning category. Appending to the end since no specific position was requested. The user also requested a daily 30-minute scales task; that will be added as a Task under this project in a follow-up operation (this operation creates the Project as specified).
